bundled_date_meaning: Date these snapshots were assembled into the dmac-curation plugin. Individual source files may have been fetched earlier — see data_provenance below.
source: Charlie Demurjian's working curation projects (intravchip + srp/lee)

files.projects_db.json: 10 projects: Break Through Cancer, CSBC, GBM, Griffith, Impact, MetNet, PUBLISHED, RMS-NGC, Shoulders, SRP
files.neo4j_assay-sample-conn.json: 176 allowed (assay, parent_type, child_type) edges (wrapper has {fetched_at, connections})

data_provenance.other_files: no embedded fetch timestamps; assumed fetched circa 2026-04-23 to 2026-05-08 across the source projects

note: Refresh via tools/refresh_context.py (planned, not yet implemented). Lockfile in each curation project records which bundled_date was used at /curate-init.
